Document:
# Core Rule 4 - Do not be sexual or shocking [color=SlateGray][italic]Revision A, 2025-10-11[/italic][/color]
This is a zero-tolerance rule. Do not engage in sexual or shocking acts or topics. [color=SlateGray](As a rule of thumb, follow the existing tone of the game. Although SS14 contains sensitive topics such as crime, violence, gore, horror, substance abuse, and physical and mental health, players should not feel additional offense.)[/color]
## Examples [color=#449944]Appropriate:[/color] - Using expletives such as "motherfucker," "dickhead," or "shit." - Discussing sensitive in-game mechanics such as vomit, gore, and mob reproduction.
[color=#994444]Prohibited:[/color] - Roleplaying erotically. - Referencing inappropriate topics such as genitalia, torture, and human excreta. - Discussing sensitive in-game mechanics in unnecessary detail or frequency.
